hero.tagline: Hybrid business and engineering profile, I drive SaaS products from scoping to production.

bio.p1: I built my career in two phases: nearly 4 years on the business side driving digital projects, then 4 years in full-stack development, including 2.5 years leading a team of 5.
bio.p2: Today I drive software and web applications end to end, bridging business needs, users and technical teams. This dual background lets me combine functional design and hands-on technical expertise (TypeScript, React, Node), within Agile Scrum environments.

fondio.title: Leading a project and need guidance? Discover Fondio
fondio.desc: Your specialized AI advisors, 100% private as they can run locally on our own servers. Strategy, finance, launch, career change: structured sessions with deliverables and a challenger mode. Manage your projects with a built-in Kanban and progress tracking.

simulator.title: Dev, is your salary aligned with the market?
simulator.desc: Find out in seconds whether your compensation matches current standards, thanks to a simulator based on over 500 salaries analyzed with machine learning.

dashboard.title: Dev, what salary in France?
dashboard.desc: Browse this dashboard and discover developer salaries in your region. Data sourced from salaires.dev.

management.title: Leadership & management
bullets: Built and led a team of 5: IT recruitment, Agile Scrum rituals and skills development
Roadmap definition and prioritization via the OKR method: 10–15 major features and 15–20 improvements per half-year
Requirements gathering, workshop facilitation and day-to-day client relations
End-to-end project delivery, from scoping to production

product.title: Design & product
bullets: Functional analysis, specification writing and application modeling
SaaS product launches and UX/UI redesigns (−80% load time, 2,000+ users)
Microservices architecture design and a Business Continuity Plan (99.3% uptime)
Integration of AI agents and LLMs into business applications (Ollama, Claude, Cursor, Copilot)

dev.title: Development
bullets: Front: React, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux, Zustand, Angular, Tailwind
DevOps: Git, Docker, CI/CD, testing (Jest, Cypress), −50 to 60% fewer bugs in production

career.hint: You can drag the canvas, the "experience" cards and the camera by holding the left click (or trackpad) while moving the mouse or your finger.

seo.title: Félix Berger | IT Project Lead & Full-Stack Developer
seo.description: Technical project lead with a hybrid profile: end-to-end SaaS product delivery, full-stack expertise (TypeScript, React, Node) and AI integration. Explore my projects and career.
